subject: Fw: Masarykovo Riverfront Building
body:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: "PNemcova@AglowProperties.com" <PNemcova@AglowProperties.com>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>; Jeffrey Epstein <sarah@ellmax.com>
Sent: Tuesday, December 4, 2007 9:28:57 AM
Subject: Fw: Masarykovo Riverfront Building

!!! Wow!!! Look at this views!!!


Let us light up your life!
Lots of love, light, and happiness,
Petra

Petra Nemcova
Partner

Aglow Properties
160 Riverside Blvd. #509
New York, NY 10069
646.761.4337

PNemcova@AglowProperties.com


-----Original Message-----
From: "Ron Schnackenberg" <RSchnack@AglowProperties.com>

Date: Tue, 4 Dec 2007 09:05:11 
To:<PNemcova@AglowProperties.com>
Subject: Masarykovo Riverfront Building


Petra, 
  
It is not currently for sale and the owner is looking to sign a contract for a refurbishment project and create “high end” residential units and sell them off individually. The property has: 
  

* Size: 1490sqm net sellable 
* Location: Masarykovo 22, river front in Prague 1, opposite to Zofin Villa. Stunning river, castle and Charles Bridge views 
* Building: 8 storey (7+1), 13 residential units, 1 large commercial/retail unit (ground floor + basement). 
* Project: refurbishment of the units with the same layout, new lift, deep renovation of common areas and façade. Top standard finishing. The attic floor will offer three duplex units 
* Expected price (once refurbished): approx. 6.500/sqm average 

  
Comments: 
  
·         The contract with the building company is not yet signed 
·         The owner intends to develop the project and sell it (in approx. 1 year) at the highest possible price (the expected € 6.500/sqm is high but still a reasonable price) 
·         The property is already divided in units (extremely difficult at this stage to change the layout, but for the last floor) at the cadastral office. 
·         We might convince them to sell in case they received a very attractive offer 
  
Possible Actions: 
  

* To bid for the building “as is”. The owner would sell a new SPV. They might accept an offer that arrives this week (best case scenario!!!) with the following structure: 

a.     Price: not less than € 5.000/sqm (as is) 
b.    Payment: immediate 10% after offer acceptance, the rest at purchase contract signature (50% into escrow account till shares registration, 50% free) 

* To bid for the refurbished units/building. In that case they would prepare a pre purchase contract and sell the building/units once they finish the works, but that would mean that the buyer accepts the existing project. 

  
As said, I’m not really sure that they would accept either one of the option, but I do not want to miss the opportunity. 
  
Ron Schnackenberg 
Partner/Licensed Real Estate Broker 
  
 AGLOW PROPERTIES 
 160 Riverside Blvd. #509 
 New York, NY 10069 
 646.761.4337 
  <mailto:RSchnack@AglowProperties.com> RSchnack@AglowProperties.com

body:
Dear Jeffrey,
He have been looking all over for River front Building in Prague and finaly a we find something! It is not for 100%, but it could work!!!
Please read the whole email bellow. Part is from Ron and from Andrea-our contact in Prague. 
Please let me know if what U think!
Hugs

Let us light up your life!
Lots of love, light, and happiness,
Petra
